calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name, Gender and issuance of new Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Rodel E. Rodis, Esq. appeared with petitioner LJohn Robles, who was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Eljin Robles.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Male to Female, and issuance of New Birth Certificate.

Decree Changing Name and Gender was submitted to and signed by the Court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Reset To Sep-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name, Gender and issuance of new Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Rodel E. Rodis, Esq. appeared with petitioner L John Robles, who was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

The Court cannot proceed with the proposed Change of Name, Gender and issuance of a new Birth Certificate as petitioner did not provide the Court with a declaration of a physician documenting the gender change through surgical treatment as provided under Health and Safety Code Sections 103425 and 103430.

Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to September 25, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218 for hearing on petitioner's request for Change of Name, Gender and Issuance of a New Birth certificate.

Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name and Gender was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Amended
